user.title: Ambient Weather Local
user.description: No IP address needed — Home Assistant learns the console's address from the data it sends. If the console is in AP mode (reset), HA will set it up over its access point; otherwise it's detected automatically once it's on your network.

pick_wifi.title: Choose the console's Wi-Fi
pick_wifi.description: Found the console's setup network **{ap}**. Pick the 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi it should join and enter its password. Home Assistant will provision it and finish setup automatically.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the console at that IP address.
error.ap_not_found: Didn't see the console's setup network yet. Put it in AP mode and scan again.

abort.already_configured: This weather station is already configured.

provision.title: Recover console
provision.description: Put the console in AP mode (hold the Wi-Fi/Sensor button ~6 s until 'AP' shows). Home Assistant will look for its setup network **{ap}** on a spare Wi-Fi radio.

pick.title: Choose the console's Wi-Fi
pick.description: Found the console's setup network **{ap}**. Pick the 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi it should join and enter its password. Home Assistant will provision it and restore your settings.

error.ap_not_found: Didn't see the console's setup network yet. Put it in AP mode and scan again.

abort.provision_done: Sent the new settings. The console is rebooting onto your Wi-Fi — data should resume within a minute.

reapply_console_settings.name: Re-apply console settings
reapply_console_settings.description: Re-write the console's Custom Server settings so it points back at Home Assistant.
